name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 5 Jun 2019
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Marketplace authentication issues will alert you in the notifications area of your control panel."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Catch field mapping labels have been updated to better match the product fields."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Updated the Catch product reference field to always be sent in lowercase."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Updated the pick order function so that it no longer unnecessarily recalculates tax."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Amazon and Catch listings that no longer have an approved product in Neto will be deleted from the marketplace."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where pop-ups were closing on mouseover in checkout."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Resolved a bug where eBay carrier tracking wasn't updated intermittently."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Corrected the incorrect \"balance due\" on the aged receivable report."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that would send empty statements to customers when they have no activity."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
